overview.Name: ADTRAN Inc
overview.Description: ADTRAN, Inc. provides networking and communications platforms and services for service providers, cable / multi-system operators, small and medium-sized businesses, and distributed businesses in the United States, Germany, Mexico, and internationally. The company is headquartered in Huntsville, Alabama.
overview.Address: 901 EXPLORER BOULEVARD, HUNTSVILLE, AL, UNITED STATES, 35806-2807
